title: Stop, Look, and Hold Hands
lesson: Stop, look both ways, and hold a grown-up's hand to cross the road safely.
prompts: On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks along the pavement, with a cheerful expression. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} walks beside them with a relaxed, attentive expression. Make the interaction read physically: the father walks beside the child with his gaze on them while the child walks alongside, the two moving together along the pavement. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a wide city sidewalk beside a curb and pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the road and zebra crossing are visible beyond the curb, and the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is at the curb line, running toward the road with one foot lifted forward and a startled expression, face visible in three-quarter profile. Farther back on the concrete sidewalk paving, with both shoes planted on square paving tiles behind the curb line, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} leans forward from behind the child and holds the back of the child's shirt and shoulder with both hands, pulling them back toward the sidewalk with a caring, urgent expression. A parked car waits in the road beyond the curb. Make the interaction read physically: the grown-up's hands visibly touch the child's back and shoulder, and the curb edge clearly separates the grown-up's shoes from the road. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a wide city sidewalk beside a curb and pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the road and zebra crossing are visible beyond the curb, and the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image pauses on pale square sidewalk paving several steps back from the road, looking toward {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT}, standing on the sidewalk paving and raising both open hands to chest height with palms facing the child, signaling stop before the road with a calm, firm expression. Make the interaction read physically: the grown-up's two raised hands form a clear stop gesture between the child and the raised curb. Only two foreground people: this child and this one grown-up. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a wide city sidewalk beside a curb and pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the road and zebra crossing are visible beyond the curb, and the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image waits on pale square sidewalk paving near a traffic light pole, looking up at a traffic light showing a red figure with a patient expression. To the child's left, closer to the building storefronts and farther from the curb, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} stands on pale square sidewalk paving with paving tiles visible around both shoes and points one hand clearly upward toward the red pedestrian light. Make the interaction read physically: the child and grown-up both look toward that red signal. Only two foreground people: this child and this one grown-up. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks across the white zebra crossing, with a confident smile, holding hands with {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} who walks beside them with a watchful, approving expression. A green walking signal glows ahead. Make the interaction read physically: the child's hand and the father's hand are clasped together as they cross, both facing forward across the zebra crossing. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

On a city street with a pedestrian crossing, clear daylight, safely on the far pavement the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, giving a happy thumbs-up, with a proud smile. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} gives a thumbs-up and a warm smile. Make the interaction read physically: the child and the father turn toward each other, each raising a thumbs-up to the other. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: On a city street with a pedestrian crossing in daylight, the child walks along the pavement, cheerful, while the father walks beside them.

At the kerb, the child runs toward the road with a startled look while the father stays on the pavement behind them and holds the back of the child's shirt and shoulder to stop them, a parked car nearby — stop first.
At the kerb, the child pauses on the pavement while the father stands on the pavement and raises both open hands to chest height, signaling not to cross the line into the road.
At the crossing by a traffic light showing red, the child waits on the pavement while the father points to the red light, teaching them not to cross until the signal changes.
The child walks across the white zebra crossing, confident, holding hands with the father, a green walking signal glowing ahead — crossing safely together.
Safely on the far pavement, the child gives a happy thumbs-up, proud, while the father gives a thumbs-up and a warm smile — crossed the road safely.
texts: {NAME} walked along the busy pavement with Dad. Up ahead was the road. "Stay close to me," said Dad. "Okay!" said {NAME}.
{NAME} ran toward the road, but Dad caught the back of {NAME}'s shirt and shoulder. "Stop first!" called Dad. "Oops, I forgot," said {NAME}.
Dad stood on the pavement and lifted both hands. "Don't cross this line yet," he said. {NAME} paused by the kerb. "I will wait," said {NAME}.
The light showed red. Dad pointed up at it. "Red means wait," said Dad. "When can we go?" asked {NAME}. "When it turns green," said Dad.
The light turned green. "Now we can go," said Dad. Holding hands, {NAME} and Dad walked safely across the stripes. Step, step, step!
Safe on the other side! Dad gave a big thumbs-up. "Well done!" he said. "Stop, look, and hold hands!" cheered {NAME}.
